allow: PowerShell($key = "AIzaSyAVes6z9Na9FpGkxtq-1HyD9ufrkumHYtA"; $url = "https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/distancematrix/json?origins=R.+Antonio+Pizzi,+Cravinhos,+SP&destinations=R.+Jose+Marques+204,+Cravinhos,+SP&mode=driving&language=pt-BR&key=$key"; $resp = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri $url; "Status: $\($resp.status\)"; if \($resp.status -ne 'OK'\) { "Error: $\($resp.error_message\)" } else { "Origem: $\($resp.origin_addresses -join ', '\)"; "Destino: $\($resp.destination_addresses -join ', '\)"; $el = $resp.rows[0].elements[0]; "Element status: $\($el.status\)"; if \($el.status -eq 'OK'\) { "Distancia: $\($el.distance.text\) \($\($el.distance.value\) m\)"; "Tempo: $\($el.duration.text\)" } })
PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command git-filter-repo -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "filter-repo: nao instalado" }; try { python --version } catch { "python: nao instalado" })
PowerShell(python -m pip install git-filter-repo 2>$null; python -m git_filter_repo --version)

PowerShell($target = '23a23ea3383611012a4f04c211b91a0993ea766d'; $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(8\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $v = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://polarispdv.vercel.app/api/version' -TimeoutSec 15\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $v = $null } ; Write-Output "$\(Get-Date -Format HH:mm:ss\) versao: $\($v.version\)" } until \(\($v -and $v.version -eq $target\) -or \(\(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\)\); if \($v.version -eq $target\) { 'DEPLOY NOVO NO AR' } else { 'TIMEOUT aguardando deploy' })
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "TYPECHECK OK" } else { "TYPECHECK FAILED" })
PowerShell(npx tsc --noEmit; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "TYPECHECK OK" } else { "TYPECHECK FAILED" })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/studio-2243391254-75492/databases/\(default\)/documents/store_profiles?pageSize=5"; $r.documents | ForEach-Object { $name = $_.name.Split\('/'\)[-1]; $slug = $_.fields.shortSlug.stringValue; $logo = $_.fields.general.mapValue.fields.logoUrl.stringValue; $storeName = $_.fields.general.mapValue.fields.name.stringValue; "$name | slug=$slug | name=$storeName | logo=$\($logo -ne $null -and $logo -ne ''\)" })

PowerShell($target = \(git rev-parse HEAD\); $deadline = \(Get-Date\).AddMinutes\(6\); do { Start-Sleep -Seconds 20; try { $v = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri 'https://polarispdv.vercel.app/api/version' -TimeoutSec 15\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $v = $null } } until \(\($v -and $v.version -eq $target\) -or \(\(Get-Date\) -gt $deadline\)\); if \($v.version -eq $target\) { 'DEPLOY NO AR' } else { "timeout - versao atual: $\($v.version\)" })

PowerShell($body = '{"structuredQuery":{"from":[{"collectionId":"store_profiles"}],"limit":3}}'; $res = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri 'https://firestore.googleapis.com/v1/projects/studio-2243391254-75492/databases/\(default\)/documents:runQuery' -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType 'application/json'; $res | ForEach-Object { if \($_.document\) { $f = $_.document.fields; [PSCustomObject]@{ id = \($_.document.name -split '/'\)[-1]; shortSlug = $f.shortSlug.stringValue; name = $f.general.mapValue.fields.name.stringValue; ogImage = $f.general.mapValue.fields.ogImageUrl.stringValue; banner = $f.general.mapValue.fields.bannerImageUrl.stringValue; logo = $f.general.mapValue.fields.logoUrl.stringValue } } } | Format-List)

PowerShell($url = 'https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com/v0/b/studio-2243391254-75492.firebasestorage.app/o/products%2F1781210316157_ChatGPT_Image_11_de_jun._de_2026__17_37_00.png?alt=media&token=ab403f98-3ba7-40d3-920c-22e8d59ea21c'; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\ogtest.png"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $tmp -UseBasicParsing; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Image]::FromFile\($tmp\); "Dimensions: $\($img.Width\) x $\($img.Height\)"; "Format: $\($img.RawFormat\)"; $img.Dispose\(\); "Size: $\(\(Get-Item $tmp\).Length\) bytes")
